title: Strong Paper Plates (7 Inch - 100 Pack) 100% Compostable Disposable Bagasse Plates - Heavy Duty Eco-Friendly Biodegradable Sugarcane Plate for Parties – Microwave & Freezer Safe
features: 𝐒𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐃𝐘 𝟕-𝐈𝐍𝐂𝐇 𝐏𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐑 𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐒 (𝐁𝐀𝐆𝐀𝐒𝐒𝐄): Strong and reliable, these 7-inch compostable paper plates made from bagasse are ideal for appetisers, desserts, and side dishes. Perfect for parties, weddings, catering, restaurants, food trucks, takeaway orders, festivals, and daily meals at home.

𝟏𝟎𝟎% 𝐒𝐔𝐆𝐀𝐑𝐂𝐀𝐍𝐄 𝐅𝐈𝐁𝐑𝐄 (𝐓𝐑𝐄𝐄-𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄): Made from bagasse, a natural by-product of sugarcane, these plates are renewable, biodegradable, eco-friendly, and completely tree-free. A plastic-free alternative to traditional paper plates without compromising strength.

𝟏𝟎𝟎% 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 (𝐀𝐒𝐓𝐌 𝐃𝟔𝟒𝟎𝟎/𝐃𝟔𝟖𝟔𝟖): Certified to meet compostability standards, these biodegradable plates safely break down in municipal or commercial composting facilities. A sustainable disposable solution that reduces landfill waste and benefits the planet.

𝐇𝐎𝐓 & 𝐂𝐎𝐋𝐃 𝐅𝐎𝐎𝐃 𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄: Heavy-duty design that is oil-resistant, water-resistant, and cut-resistant. Suitable for hot foods such as curries, pasta, or rice, and cold dishes like salads, fruit, or desserts. Contains no plastic or wax lining, making them safe for all types of meals.

𝐌𝐈𝐂𝐑𝐎𝐖𝐀𝐕𝐄 & 𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄𝐙𝐄𝐑 𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄: Designed for convenience, these disposable plates can go from freezer to microwave without warping. Perfect for reheating leftovers, storing food, or serving fresh meals at parties, BBQs, catering events, and corporate functions.
description: Product Description Disposable Sugarcane Pulp Paper Plates ALL-NATIRAL ORGANIC HEAVY-DUTY PLATES PAPER PLATES FOR YOUR FAMILY AND FRIENDS! Ditch the flimsy, guilt-inducing plastic paper plates and upgrade to Ask Packaging bagasse paper plates, the ultimate in green dining. Ask Packaging paper plates are the perfect blend of style and sustainability, featuring a sturdy and durable design that can handle any meal, from a picnic in the park to a fancy dinner party. Ask Packaging plates are the responsible choice for anyone who cares about the environment. With their heavy-duty construction and versatile design, our bulk paper plates are perfect for any occasion, from birthdays, weddings, and picnics, to fancy dinners and backyard barbecues. Whether you're serving up a sizzling steak or a stack of pancakes, these plates will hold up to whatever you dish out. Ask Packaging is designed for style and comfort. We love elevating any occasion with classy, versatile, durable, disposable party supplies. We provide the finest bagasse tableware for any type of food service - from caterers, to party planners, and at-home hosts. We'll help you serve guests at your wedding, shower, outdoor barbecue, Christmas party or corporate event. These paper plates are made of natural materials and can be dissolved by the environment. It also meets the food surface contact safety standard and does not contain BPA. Wax free lining, non-toxic. Provide you with a healthy disposable paper plates to make your party happy and burden free. This paper plate great for home, restaurant, wedding, party, events, camping, picnic. Microwavable & Freezable Oil and Cut-resistant 100% Sugarcane Fiber Hot or Cold Use Perfect for Any Occasion Safe & Durable Easily Compost Disposable Heavy-Duty Disposable Paper Plates WATER PROOFING The waterproof coating on Ask Packaging paper plates adds a layer of protection to the plates themselves, ensuring that your food stays securely in place without any mess or spills. They are the perfect plates for any occasion. OIL PROOFING Ask Packaging disposable paper plates feature a special water and oil-proof coating that prevents the plates from getting soggy or breaking down, even with the juiciest of meals. SMOOTH BURR-FREE SURFACE Ask Packaging coated paper plates feature a smooth, burr-free surface that provides a comfortable and enjoyable dining experience, ensuring that you can comfortably hold and eat from them. Enjoy The Convenience Of Disposable Products With Peace Of Mind! FOOD GRADE MATERIAL Our disposable paper bulk plates are made of sugarcane bagasse, a food grade material They have no wax lining, gluten-free and plastic-free You will not find BPA that can be found in plastic plates FREEZER & MICROWAVE SAFE Great for hot and cold food, suitable for refrigerator and microwave The disposable plates don't get sticky when it's used to hold liquid food, They have good heat resistance, oil resistance and cut resistance APPLICABLE SCENARIOS The disposable plates in a simple atmospheric white look, Great for dinners, parties, camping, weddings, birthdays, BBQs Available for steaks, salads, desserts, appetizers, cakes It can be used for Christmas or New Year SAY GOODBYE TO PLASTIC POLLUTION Tired of feeling guilty every time you toss out a pile of used paper plates? Let our strong paper dinner plates put your mind at ease! Made from sugarcane pulp, our plates will decompose naturally in any composting environment, leaving behind nothing but good vibes and rich soil. Ask Packaging Disposable Paper Plates Suitable for Dinners, Parties, Camping, Weddings, Birthdays, BBQs & Christmas IDEAL FOR OUTDOOR & INDOOR EVENTS IDEAL FOR PICNIC Ready to take your picnic game to the next level? Look no further than our paper plates! With their durable and lightweight design, Ask Packaging plates are the perfect picnic supplies for any outdoor adventure, from a day at the beach to a hike in the woods. So go ahead, pack up your favorite snacks and drinks, and head out into the great outdoors with confidence and style. Our strong disposable plates will be there to hold your feast, without weighing you down (or damaging the planet). Happy picnicking! IDELA FOR PARTIES Ready to throw the ultimate party without the hassle of cleaning up? Ask Packaging plates have got your back! They are the perfect match for any party theme or occasion, from a birthday bash, wedding, or bachelorette party, Christmas party to a fancy dinner soiree. So go ahead, invite all your friends and family over, and let the good times roll. Our plates will be there to keep the party going. Cheers!
